description: Configure repository deployment settings, metadata priorities, and AI provider defaults.
flags.source-path.summary: Path to the Salesforce project containing deployment config
flags.set.description: Set a configuration value such as testLevel=RunLocalTests
flags.get.summary: Get a config value by key
flags.get.description: Get a configuration value from repository config
flags.get-priority.description: Get deployment priority for a metadata component such as ApexClass:MyClass
flags.set-priority.description: Set deployment priority using MetadataType:Name=priority, for example ApexClass:Critical=100
flags.set-llm-provider.summary: Set the default LLM provider for AI services
flags.set-llm-model.summary: Set the default LLM model for AI services
flags.set-llm-endpoint.summary: Set the default LLM API endpoint
flags.set-llm-timeout.summary: Set the default LLM timeout in milliseconds
errors.invalidLlmTimeout: LLM timeout must be greater than or equal to 1 millisecond
